title: Blind App: GlobalTech Employees React to Restructuring News
snippet: GlobalTech employees share mixed reactions — some praise TechForward transfer, others question true nature of restructuring.
content: Thread: GlobalTech 'Accelerate AI' — What's really happening? Anonymous (L5 SWE, Cloud): 'I'm transferring to TechForward. Same salary, same role. Doesn't feel like a layoff.' Anonymous (L4 PM, Enterprise): 'I took the VSP. 6 months salary is solid.' Anonymous (New hire, Sales): 'I read on Business Insider that we got laid off and revenue dropped 12%? Our revenue GREW. I'm at my desk right now.' Anonymous (L5 SWE, TechForward): 'The BI article is wild. Nobody got fired. 800 of us just changed email domains. The other 400 CHOSE to leave with 6 months pay.'
